body:
## Summary

- Move the storage-backed Node test TypeScript loader into `tests/helpers/storageStoreHarness.cjs`.
- Add a generic `loadTsModule` helper for non-storage TS modules while preserving the storage/MMKV harness behavior.
- Migrate the review, highlights, and learning tests away from per-file TS loader and local MMKV/Zustand stubs.
- Update the Zustand stub so selector calls and in-place state updates match the store tests' expectations.

## Validation

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test scripts/learning.test.js --test-name-pattern "XP rules|dashboard selectors|progress answer dates"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test tests/v1-1-highlights-store.test.js --test-name-pattern "addHighlight|clearChapter|runtime highlight|updateHighlight"`

## Notes

The broader storage verifier now gets past the harness/source-guard concerns. Remaining failures are existing product issues already represented in the task queue, including q001 generated answer parity, local study import unsafe-key handling, companion read-fail soft fallback, and review store robustness/hydration guards.
title: [codex] Centralize storage test TypeScript loader
